source: staging-rancher.kubetee.ai /v3 API, captured read-only 2026-07-16; all values below re-expressed synthetically per the g004 V1 field allowlist

collection.next_page: follow pagination.next URL (marker-based) until the field is absent
incomplete_signals: pagination.partial is true and pagination.next is absent
pagination object missing on a collection
unrecognized pagination fields beyond the listed set

cluster.delete_authorization_signal: links.remove (presence is an inference only, never proof)
cluster.conditional_delete: unsupported: norman v3 objects expose uuid but no resourceVersion; the pre-delete recheck is a GET re-validating id, uuid, label value, and non-management identity
management_cluster_markers: id c-x* naming for imported management

http_client_requirements.reason: Cloudflare fronts staging Rancher and blocks the default python-urllib signature with 'error code: 1010'; curl and custom UAs verified passing (HTTP 200)
